description: CompositionBlue jeans with heavily washed and distressed look made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, double patch pocket detail on the right front pocket, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, embedded branding on the front right pocket, torn distressed look on the front on both sides with metal button and zipper closure on the frontFitSlim fit Regular riseWash careWash inside out separately in mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeThe manually treated denim with the heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from Deni-yo, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with t-shirts and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M, length 44.5&rdquo on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
